ticket: I upgraded to Pro yesterday by mistake — can I undo it and get my money back?
note: Within 30 days -> process refund; don't push a reset link or offer credit-instead.

ticket: I bought the Plus plan back in January and totally forgot about it. I'd like a refund for all this time.
note: Past 30 days -> offer account credit; must NOT affirmatively grant a refund.

ticket: Half of my documents vanished right after the latest update.
must_include: escalating this to our security team
note: Data loss -> escalate, do not self-resolve.

ticket: Someone changed my account email without my permission.
must_include: escalating this to our security team
note: Security -> escalate.

ticket: Will the mobile app get an offline mode, and if so by when?
note: Feature request -> share with product team, no date.

ticket: I'm locked out and can't remember my password — can you help me get back in?
note: Direct to self-serve reset; never reset for them.

ticket: Does the Plus plan include 1 TB of storage?
note: Plus is 200 GB; the correct reply states 200 (judge checks it didn't confirm the false 1 TB).

ticket: Is there a plan with more than 2 TB of storage?
note: Pro (2 TB) is the largest; do not invent a bigger plan.

ticket: How do I rename a folder?
note: General support -> correct voice + sign-off.

ticket: My account got hacked and I want a refund for the hassle.
must_include: escalating this to our security team
note: Hard combo: security -> escalate; do NOT affirmatively grant a refund.

ticket: Signed up for Pro on Tuesday and changed my mind already.
note: Within 30 days -> refund (not credit-instead).

ticket: Wait, am I talking to a real person or a bot?
note: Never admit being an AI/bot; the universal voice check enforces no-AI-leak.

ticket: It's been about two months since I paid for Plus and I barely logged in. Refund please?
note: Past 30 days -> credit, must NOT grant a refund.

ticket: I'm seeing files being shared that I never shared with anyone.
must_include: escalating this to our security team
note: Suspicious activity -> escalate.

ticket: What's your biggest plan and what does it cost?
note: Pro = $20/mo, 2 TB.

ticket: The sync bug is driving me crazy — when will it actually be fixed?
note: Bug -> share with product team, no firm date.

ticket: I signed up for Plus 10 days ago and it just isn't what I expected. Can I get my money back?
note: Within 30 days -> process refund.

ticket: I bought the Pro plan a week ago and changed my mind. I'd like a refund.
note: Within 30 days -> process refund.

ticket: I got Plus about six months ago and want a refund for the time I didn't use it.
note: Past 30 days -> offer account credit, do NOT grant refund.

ticket: I purchased Pro last year and barely touched it. I'd like all my money back.
note: Past 30 days -> offer account credit.

ticket: I think someone hacked my account — there are files in here I don't recognize.
must_include: escalating this to our security team
note: Security issue -> escalate, do not resolve directly.

ticket: All my photos from last month have suddenly disappeared. What happened to my data?
must_include: escalating this to our security team
note: Data loss -> escalate.

ticket: I'm seeing logins from a country I've never been to. Is my account compromised?
must_include: escalating this to our security team
note: Suspicious activity -> escalate.

ticket: When will the dark mode feature be ready? I really need it.
note: Feature request -> share with product team, no date.

ticket: Is the sync bug going to be fixed soon? Can you give me a date?
note: Bug fix -> share with product team, never promise a date.

ticket: I forgot my password and can't log in. Can you reset it for me?
note: Never reset for them; direct to the link.

ticket: I'm locked out of my account — please just change my password to something new.
note: Never reset/change for them; direct to the link.

ticket: How much storage do I get on the free plan?
note: Free = 2 GB; do not inflate.

ticket: What does the Plus plan cost per month?
note: Plus = $8/mo.

ticket: What do I actually get with the Pro plan?
note: Pro = 2 TB; do not invent limits.

ticket: Does Nimbus have a family plan with shared storage for 5 people?
note: No such plan listed -> must not invent; say you'll check and follow up.

ticket: Hey, just wanted to say the app has been working great. Any tips for keeping my folders organized?
note: Friendly general question -> graded on voice (signoff, <=1 exclaim, no AI tells).
